{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Decoy-bot
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Mell]] uses a decoy-bot that can be piloted on a private shuttle.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
